title: Cherry Grove Starter House
description: Adds a Cherry Grove Starter House to the game
body:
This mod adds a cozy cherry grove starter house to the game, perfect for staying safe during your first nights.

It's an ideal spot to begin your journey and build a nice base, keeping you safe from monsters.

Inside the chest you will find some simple cherry grove related loot, helping you a bit at the start off the game.

![front view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8d16272760513b8cd175b49857e54a053ee958a.jpeg)

you can find the structure only in cherry grove biomes.

 



Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
